title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune

title: Bitcoin Covenants part 3: SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
briefing: APO lets a Bitcoin signature authorize any compatible UTXO rather than one fixed outpoint. It allows for rebindable pre-signed transactions for Lightning, vaults, and layer-2 protocols without new key management overhead.
